jobs.title: Senior Frontend developer Vue.js
jobs.rawDescription: • 🚀 Frontend Engineer | Producto SaaS (IT / Device Management) • ¿Tienes experiencia con Vue.js (versión 3)? ¿Dónde vas a trabajar? Nuestro cliente es una organización de tamaño medio dedicada al sector de Tecnología y Telecomunicaciones. Se especializan en el desarrollo de soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas y están comprometidos con la excelencia en cada proyecto. Descripción 🔧 El rol: • Formarás parte del equipo de frontend y tendrás un impacto directo en cómo los administradores IT interactúan con la plataforma. Tu responsabilidad principal será diseñar y construir interfaces web modernas, intuitivas y escalables, capaces de simplificar flujos de trabajo técnicos y complejos. No es un rol centrado únicamente en crear componentes, sino en pensar producto:• Traducir necesidades reales de usuarios técnicos en experiencias claras y eficientes. • Trabajar de forma muy cercana con Producto, UX y Backend en la definición de soluciones. • Mejorar de forma continua la usabilidad, rendimiento y escalabilidad del frontend. • Mantener altos estándares de calidad mediante buenas prácticas, revisiones de código y documentación. • Investigar e incorporar tecnologías frontend modernas (APIs de navegador, nuevas soluciones de interacción, etc.). • Mantener y evolucionar interfaces existentes, asegurando una experiencia sólida y consistente. ¿A quién buscamos (H/M/D)? ✅Buscamos un perfil hands-on, con mentalidad de producto y gusto por el código bien hecho: • Experiencia sólida desarrollando aplicaciones web con Vue.js (preferiblemente Vue 3) y Tailwind CSS. • Buen dominio de TypeScript, JavaScript moderno (ES6+), estándares web y patrones de diseño. • Experiencia trabajando con APIs web y entendiendo cómo interactúan frontend y backend. • Buenas prácticas de desarrollo: clean code, testing, revisiones y control de versiones (Git). • Capacidad para desenvolverse en un entorno internacional, con nivel alto de inglés. • Experiencia trabajando en entornos Agile y equipos multidiscip

score.reason: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Tailwind stack match (all expert skills). Product-focused senior role emphasizing UX/API integration and clean code—core strengths. Spain-based remote, Spanish-language role.

jobs.title: Remote Vue.js Developer – JavaScript Framework Expert
jobs.rawDescription: Job Summary Houston Skilled Consultancy is seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Vue.js Developer to join our dynamic remote development team. As a JavaScript Framework Expert, you will be responsible for building and optimizing responsive, feature-rich front-end web applications. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in Vue.js and experience with modern development practices, working closely with UI/UX designers, backend developers, and project managers to deliver cutting-edge web solutions. Key Responsibilities • * Develop and maintain user-facing features using Vue.js • * Optimize components for maximum performance across a range of web-capable devices and browsers • * Collaborate with cross-functional teams including designers and backend developers to create seamless user experiences • * Translate UI/UX wireframes into high-quality, scalable code • * Implement and manage state management libraries such as Vuex or Pinia • * Conduct code reviews and maintain high-quality coding standards • * Ensure the technical feasibility of UI/UX designs and suggest improvements • * Debug and resolve performance bottlenecks, compatibility issues, and general bugs • * Stay updated with emerging trends in web technologies and frameworks • Required Skills and Qualifications • * Strong proficiency in JavaScript and Vue.js (2.x/3.x) • * Deep understanding of Vue CLI, Vue Router, and Vuex/Pinia • * Solid experience with RESTful APIs and asynchronous request handling • * Familiarity with HTML5, CSS3, SASS/SCSS, and responsive design principles • * Proficiency in Git and modern development workflows (CI/CD, Agile/Scrum) • * Experience with front-end testing frameworks such as Jest or Mocha • * Familiarity with webpack or other module bundlers • Experience • * Minimum 3+ years of professional experience in front-end development • * At least 2 years of hands-on experience specifically with Vue.js • * Proven track record of building scalable, high-performance web appli

score.reason: Vue.js is primary with Pinia and HTML/CSS/SASS—strong alignment with Alfonso's core expertise. Well-matched senior IC frontend role.

jobs.title: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue)

jobs.rawDescription: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. 🎯 Your main goal will be to build and ship end-to-end TypeScript product features that customers feel in their workflows the same week - balancing speed, quality, and high security standards. To do so, you’ll own outcomes across the full stack and stay close to users, product, and metrics: End-to-end product ownership Own a product area surface from discovery to delivery, including iteration after launch. Ship high-quality features fast across the TypeScript stack, balancing UX, performance, and maintainability. Partner closely with Product to translate customer problems into clear scopes and

score.reason: Well-funded senior product engineer role with explicit Spain location acceptance. Strong Vue and TypeScript match; primary concern is full-stack backend ownership requiring NodeJS expertise beyond Alfonso's basic level.

jobs.title: Senior Front-end Engineer - REMOTE - VUE.JS
jobs.rawDescription: YOUR ROLE We need someone like you to help create software solutions that help millions of users make informed decisions. If you’re looking to make an impact while leveraging groundbreaking technologies, this is the place for you. At Launch Potato you will be an integral member of the LP Tech Team where you will have the opportunity to lead our technical path and be empowered to drive our products. Our team has built groundbreaking technology that helps us understand our millions of users and helps them reach their personal goals every day across our portfolio of brands. On any given day you might be working on our proprietary platform creating solutions that improve the UIs we use to visualize and manage our data. Or you might be improving the user experience on one of our owned and operated sites by launching a new product. Whatever it may be, you will be making an impact! You will be working cross-functionally with passionate, extremely smart individuals with tons of opportunities for learning, growth, and mentorship. We are an extremely fun and tight-knit team (our company retreats are fabulous), so we are very selective about who we hire to ensure our company values remain high. As part of the LP Tech Team, will have access to the best tools to remove any blockers and enable your success. On a typical day you might: • Develop javascript component-based plugins • Write front end code for dashboards that allow non-technical users to intuitively interact with data • Collaborate with product managers, designers, stakeholders, anyone to help create the best product possible • Coach and mentor other engineers on best practices • Research new technologies and prototype potential solutions • Lead discussions about project architecture and technical feasibility • Build internal tools used to increase team productivity Our current tech stack: • Frontend languages and Libraries • HTML5/Javascript, • jQuery, Vue.js, React, Node.js, GraphQL • CSS Grid, flexbox, bootstrap, m

score.reason: Vue is primary with senior architecture and mentoring roles matching Alfonso's profile. Absent TypeScript mention and jQuery in active stack raise code-quality concerns; incomplete posting limits full assessment.

jobs.title: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers
jobs.rawDescription: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers Blackshark AI | Software Engineers & Platform Engineers | Full-time | Austria or Remote EU Hours | VISA sponsorship available We build geospatial AI infrastructure. Our platform lets analysts train custom object and change detection models on satellite/aerial/drone imagery in minutes, then reconstructs 3D terrain from those detections. We just shipped a planetary-scale simulation platform with Lockheed Martin powered by Unreal Engine. If you want to work on distributed systems that run in a data center one day and an edge laptop the next, we have interesting problems. Our training and inference infrastructure is processing trillions of pixels and we deliver real world impact for our customers across defense, intelligence, and local governments. Tech Stack: Python, Fast API, PyTorch, Postgres, Redis, Vue.js Infrastructure Stack: Kubernetes & Docker, Linux, AWS & Azure, Azure DevOps, Terraform, ELK, Prometheus & Grafana, ArgoCD & Helm Roles: Software Engineer - Frontend UI https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/5c596b85-5134-4601-be25-... Any communication from our in house Talent Acquisition team will only ever come from our contentsquare.com or @contentsquare-ext.com domain. For more information, visit our careers blog. needsReview.title: Senior -ohjelmistokehittäjä
needsReview.rawDescription: Hei sinä Full Stackin konkari! Kiinnostaako sinuakin työpaikka, jossa on avoin kulttuuri ja vähän byrokratiaa? Tarjoamme sinun ympärille muokkaantuvan modernin työpaikan ohjelmistokehityksen monipuolisilla haasteilla höystettynä. Mikä Ceon on? Toteutamme mielenkiintoisia verkkopalveluita ja mobiilisovelluksia pääosin pk-seudulla. Etsimme nyt full stack- kehittäjää työkaveriksemme - kivaa tyyppiä, joka innostuu uuden oppimisesta ja arvostaa erinomaista työympäristöä. Tulet toimeen erilaisten ihmisten kanssa ja haluat olla mukana myös rakentamassa parasta mahdollista työpaikkaa myös itsellesi. Päivän työt suunnitellaan tiimeissä monitoimittajaympäristössä ja omaan työnkuvaa on mahdollista laajentaa kiinnostuksista riippuen. Teemme töitä konttoriltamme Pitäjänmäessä, asiakkaiden tiloissa pääkaupunkiseudulla, osittain yhdessä sekä halutessamme itse kukin valitsemassamme etätyöpisteissä. Toivomme sinulta Vähintään 6+ vuoden kokemusta asiakasprojekteissa Palavaa intohimoa koodaamiseen Mielenkiintoa uuden oppimiseen Kärsivällisyyttä haasteiden edessä Lojaaliutta ja joustavuutta takataskussasi Vahva suomenkielen suullinen ja kirjallinen osaaminen Sinulla on hallussasi frontin puolelta Vue, React, Angular, TypeScript tai muu JavaScriptiin perustuva framework. Back end -kehityksestä sinulle tuttuja ovat Java (ja spring), Node.js, PHP, Python, C# tai Scala. Olet tehnyt tietokantahommia MySQL:n, PostgreSQL:n, Firebase:n tai MongoDB:n kanssa. Docker, Linux, Ngninx tai Apache ovat myös olleet osa pelikirjaasi ja AWS, Azure tai Google Cloud ovat olleet projekteissasi vuosien varrella mukana. Arvostamme lisäksi Kommunikaatio- ja viestintätaitoja Järjestelmällisyyttä ja organisointikykyä Halua jakaa tietoa ja auttaa tarvittaessa myös muita Riittävästi itseohjautuvuutta Ymmärrystä kaikenlaiselle huumorille ja pilkettä silmäkulmassa Lisätietoa tehtävästä löydät Ceonin verkkosivuilta : https://www.ceon.fi/tyopaikat/senior-fullstack/ Laita meille viestiä palkkatoiveesi kera. Toivottavas

score.reason: Helsinki hybrid requiring fluent Finnish; Alfonso doesn't speak Finnish. Full-stack backend-heavy (Java/Spring primary) with Vue as one of multiple framework options—not a Vue specialist role.

needsReview.title: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js)
needsReview.rawDescription: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js) About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. Role We’re looking for an Engineering Lead (TypeScript/Node.js) to join our Engineering & Data team. As an Engineering Lead, you'll combine strong individual technical contributions with team leadership. You'll be responsible for the technical direction of your squad, the growth of your engineers, and the delivery of high-impact projects. This is a hybrid IC/manager role — you'll still write code, but your leverage is through the team. Lead the technical direction and architecture for your squad's domain Drive design reviews, set coding standards, and ensure engineering excellence Own the full delivery of complex, cross-team technical initiatives Build, scale and operate Node.js/TypeScript backend services on AWS/EKS Define the infrastructure and reliability strategy for your team's systems Partner with Product and Data to translate business goals into technical roadmaps Grow engineers through 1:1s, code reviews, mentorship and technical coaching Identify systemic risks and drive improvements before they become incidents Be an ambassador for engineering culture: psychological safety, pragmatism, and craft Profile (MUST have) 7+ years of professional software engineering experience 2+ years of experience leading an engineering team (formal or informal) Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript

score.reason: Backend infrastructure and team leadership role with zero Vue.js component—fundamentally misaligned with Alfonso's frontend specialization. Hybrid Paris location incompatible with full-remote-in-Spain preference.
